scripts.install:all: cd frontend && cmd /c npm install && cd ../backend && cmd /c npm install && cd ../ai-service && cmd /c npm install
scripts.dev:backend: cd backend && cmd /c npm run dev
scripts.dev:frontend: cd frontend && cmd /c npm run dev
scripts.dev:ai: cd ai-service && cmd /c npm run dev
scripts.setup: cmd /c npm run install:all && cd backend && npx prisma generate && npx prisma db push && npx prisma db seed
